title: "bufferCount()"

<!-- generated by website/scripts/gen-api-docs.mjs; do not edit -->

bufferCount: batch consecutive source DATA into arrays of length `count`; the remainder flushes on
source COMPLETE. Single dep + `ctx.state` buffer + `completeWhenDepsComplete:false +
terminalAsRealInput:true`.

## Import

```ts
import { bufferCount } from "@graphrefly/ts/operators";
```

## Signature

```ts
function bufferCount(count: number): Operator<S, S[]>
```

## Parameters

| Parameter | Type | Description |
|---|---|---|
| `count` | `number` | count value used by the helper. |

## Returns

A `Operator<S, S[]>` value.

## Example

```ts
import { bufferCount } from "@graphrefly/ts/operators";
```

## Source

`packages/ts/src/graph/combinators.ts`
